This project skeleton includes gradlew scripts and gradle-wrapper.properties,
but the binary file gradle-wrapper.jar was not bundled by the generation environment.

Recovery options:
1. If you have Gradle installed locally:
   gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.8

2. Or copy these files from any clean Gradle 8.8 project:
   - gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar
   - gradlew
   - gradlew.bat

3. After that, run:
   gradlew.bat tasks
   gradlew.bat runClient
